purpose: Define objective and testable status semantics so route presence, visual proof or partial touchpoints are never counted as process-step implementation.

scope.applies_to: All retained P0 process steps in the Process Universe inventory.

classification_principles.rule: A process step is implemented only when its behavior, state transition, permissions, payload visibility, audit/evidence obligation and positive plus negative proof are all satisfied where applicable.
A route, component, screenshot, static text, status chip or visible button is not process implementation by itself.
Safety-sensitive steps cannot be promoted beyond partial until the relevant negative tests prove no bypass, no leakage and no overclaim.
If a step is blocked by an unresolved product, safety, route, schema or handoff decision, the blocker state outranks partial implementation evidence.
Not-authorized work must remain out of implementation matrices and completion claims until a later explicit authority changes the operative contract.

proof_layers.name: route_or_entrypoint
objective_evidence: planned route decision with route-evolution record

proof_layers.name: audit_or_evidence
objective_evidence: failure behavior when audit/evidence write is unavailable

proof_layers.name: positive_test
objective_evidence: route smoke where route presence is the only requirement

acceptance_states.label: Implemented
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The step is implemented end-to-end for its approved scope and has current positive and negative proof for every applicable safety, visibility, audit, evidence and workflow obligation.
required_all: step exists in retained P0 inventory
owning area is assigned
approved route or process entrypoint exists
UI state or API/service behavior performs the step or explicitly delegates it
required permissions and gates are enforced
required audit/evidence events are written or fail closed
positive acceptance proof exists
negative acceptance proof exists for relevant failure, RBAC, visibility and overclaim risks
no unresolved decision/schema/authorization blocker applies
disqualifiers: only screenshot or static UI evidence
no negative proof for safety-sensitive step

acceptance_states.label: Partially implemented
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The step has real current-app touchpoints in more than one layer, but at least one required behavior, state, gate, audit/evidence or positive/negative proof layer is missing.
required_all: step exists in retained P0 inventory
owning area is assigned
at least two objective touchpoint layers exist
missing layers are explicitly listed
required_any: route/API/model/test touchpoints listed in Process Universe

acceptance_states.label: Visual-only
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The step is represented by a visible screen, component, button, chip, table, modal, drawer or screenshot, but lacks verified behavior or state transition proof.
required_all: visible UI representation exists
no reliable service/API/workflow/test proof confirms the step behavior
disqualifiers: positive and negative behavior proof exists

acceptance_states.label: Specified-only
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The step is defined in the Process Universe and has intended area/status metadata, but current app evidence does not prove a working implementation.
required_all: step exists in retained P0 inventory
step has process/domain/area metadata
no sufficient current-app implementation proof exists
disqualifiers: current route/API/model/test touchpoints satisfy partial criteria
step is outside retained P0 inventory

acceptance_states.label: Missing
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The retained P0 step should exist in the product implementation path, but no current route, process entry, component, API/service, model or test touchpoint can be identified.
required_all: step exists in retained P0 inventory
owning area can be assigned
no current-app touchpoint can be identified
disqualifiers: specified-only is more accurate because source metadata exists but implementation is not expected yet

acceptance_states.label: Blocked by decision
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The step cannot be implemented or accepted until a human/product/safety/route-unlock decision is made.
required_any: open_decisions contains an unresolved product/safety/route decision
route evolution record is required but not approved
screen split decision is required but not approved
final approval token or decision artifact is missing

acceptance_states.label: Blocked by schema
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The step requires a persistence/model/API contract that is absent or explicitly not authorized for blind creation in the current handoff.
required_all: step requires persistence, durable state, model relation or API contract
current schema/API does not support the required behavior
operative handoff does not authorize blind schema/API creation

acceptance_states.label: Not authorized
acceptance_states.objective_definition: The step or route behavior is outside the current operative authority or explicitly forbidden by the handoff, route scope, safety boundary or protected-lane rule.
required_any: route or process is outside current authorized handoff scope
implementation would create unapproved advice/client visibility/export/download/admin bypass
implementation requires main branch or uploaded snapshot as target truth

classification_algorithm.description: Apply blocker states before credit states. Implemented can only be assigned after all disqualifiers are false.

steps.if: Process Universe metadata exists but implementation proof is absent
two or more touchpoint layers exist but required behavior/proof layers are missing
implemented.required_all true and all implemented.disqualifiers false

upgrade_requires: two or more current-app touchpoint layers

P0_ADVISOR_NOT_RELEASE_GATE: advisor approval moves only to compliance-pending
P0_AUDIT_PERSISTENCE_GATE: audit failure blocks or holds safety action
P0_HOLD_ROUTE_BLOCK_GATE: hold route unavailable or clearly protected

must_fail_matrix_generation_if: any retained step lacks an acceptance_state
any implemented state lacks positive proof reference
any safety-sensitive implemented state lacks negative proof reference
any not_authorized state has a next_implementation_target other than decision_or_scope_update
